title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Morris Heights, Bronx
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Morris Heights, Bronx. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Morris Heights residents facing bat infestations need prompt, professional intervention to protect their homes and health. Our bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies while sealing entry points to prevent future invasions. We specialize in humane bat control that complies with all New York wildlife regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Morris Heights with safe, effective bat removal solutions. Our certified technicians understand the unique architecture of Morris Heights' pre-war apartment buildings and single-family homes, ensuring complete exclusion without structural damage.
localContext: Morris Heights' historic buildings along the Grand Concourse and residential neighborhoods near University Avenue often provide ideal roosting sites for bats in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. The area's proximity to the Harlem River and tree-lined streets creates attractive habitats that can lead bats to seek shelter in nearby structures during seasonal migrations.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Morris Heights home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near potential entry points, small droppings (guano) in attics or on windowsills, and seeing bats entering or exiting your home at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Is bat removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use humane, non-toxic exclusion methods that safely remove bats without harming them or exposing your family to chemicals. Our technicians wear protective equipment and follow strict safety protocols to prevent any disease transmission during the removal process.

faqs.question: What does the $900 – $2,500 price range cover?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on colony size, entry point locations, and exclusion complexity. The service includes full inspection, humane bat removal, sealing all entry points, sanitation of affected areas, and a warranty against re-entry. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Most residential bat exclusion projects take 1-3 days to complete, depending on the size of your home and severity of the infestation. We install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, then seal all entry points once we confirm the colony has vacated. Follow-up inspections ensure complete success.
